channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LeBron James becomes first to score 50,000 combined points in NBA regular season and playoffs
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James is well on his way to rewriting every previous definition of basketball longevity, and the 40-year-old star is now racking up numbers the NBA has never seen before.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Roki Sasaki pitches 3 scoreless innings in his spring debut with the Dodgers
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Roki Sasaki pitched three scoreless innings for the Los Angeles Dodgers in his spring training debut against the Cincinnati Reds on Tuesday night. Sasaki allowed two hits, struck out five and walked one. The right-hander threw 46 pitches, 26 for strikes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Top NFL Draft prospect Travis Hunter’s stance on 2-way difficulty criticized by Shannon Sharpe, Chad Johnson
item.description: A pair of former NFL stars took aim at Travis Hunter's position that what he does as a two-way player was more challenging than what Shohei Ohtani does in baseball.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys and defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa agree on $80M, 4-year contract, agent says
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys and defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa agreed Tuesday on an $80 million, four-year contract with $58 million guaranteed, his agent said. The agreement came a few hours before the deadline for clubs to apply the franchise tag on one player.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dublin: Beloved Emerald High basketball coach will not return, district says
item.description: Supporters of Jason Rockwell, known as "Coach Rock" last week showed up in droves at a Dublin Unified School District board meeting demanding Rockwell keep his job.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Martin, The Mercury News

item.title: Times Square boxing event in May promises to be big, with 3 fights and talk of half a million fans
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Big boxing in New York for long meant Madison Square Garden, in recent years Barclays Center as well. Fight night in Times Square promises to be a whole different scene.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: California college faces backlash for replacing men's, women's locker rooms with all-sex locker rooms
item.description: UC Davis has announced plans to convert its men's and women's locker rooms at recreation centers into “universal" all-sex locker rooms.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets release wide receiver Davante Adams as new regime continues roster overhaul
item.description: Davante Adams’ reunion with Aaron Rodgers lasted just 11 games with the New York Jets. The team released the veteran wide receiver Tuesday, ahead of the start of the NFL’s new league year next week. The move, which was expected, will save the Jets $29.9 million in salary cap space.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bruins trade big forward Trent Frederic to the Oilers in a 3-team deal with the Devils
item.description: The defending Western Conference champion Edmonton Oilers made their first big move ahead of the NHL trade deadline Tuesday, acquiring hard-nosed forward Trent Frederic from the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eagles make Barkley highest-paid running back with 2-year, $41.2M deal, AP source says
item.description: Saquon Barkley will become the highest-paid running back in NFL history after his record-setting season helped the Philadelphia Eagles win the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Attorneys in college sports lawsuit point to 'intergalactic paradigm shift' for NCAA
item.description: Attorneys seeking approval of the $2.8 billion legal settlement for college sports pointed to nearly 102,000 athletes who signed up to receive damages from the action, while batting down objections to what they described as the “intergalactic paradigm shift” the settlement will create across the NCA
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Darnold pointed toward free agency after Vikings pass on franchise tag with McCarthy waiting
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings will likely let their starting quarterback set the NFL free agent market for a second straight offseason.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Flo Rida set to perform postgame concert at Rate Field this summer
item.description: Flo Rida will perform at a postgame concert at Rate Field following the White Sox game versus the San Francisco Giants on Friday, June 27 at 6:40 p.m. CT, with on-field Postgame Concert passes available to single-game ticket purchasers and White Sox season ticket holders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: GOP senator calls out Dems' reported pro-women attire at Trump speech after blocking trans athlete bill
item.description: Democrat congresswomen are reportedly planning to wear pink to protest Trump at his joint address just one day after blocking a bill to protect female athletes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ACC, Clemson, Florida State approve settlement to end legal fight, change revenue-distribution model
item.description: The Atlantic Coast Conference, Clemson and Florida State are ready to move forward together after legal fights that threatened the stability of the league.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pete Rose talks Hall of Fame induction in one of final interviews before death
item.description: MLB's all-time hit king, Pete Rose, spoke about his Hall of Fame chances in one his last known interviews just before his death in September.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rivalry games highlight final week of college basketball's regular season
item.description: The college basketball season has wound down toward the end, with some conference tournaments already starting. The major conferences still have a week left in the regular season and that means rivalry games — and some big ones.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 USC hopes to build off first conference title in 31 years in Big Ten tournament
item.description: With their first regular season conference championship in 31 years in hand, Southern California will turn its attention to the Big Ten tournament. The second-ranked Trojans know winning that championship will be difficult.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-NFLer Chris Kluwe says he was fired from job after MAGA protest
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe said he was fired from his high school football coaching position after a MAGA plaque protest.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Bay Area rap legend to perform at Oakland Roots opener
item.description: (KRON) -- Bay Area rap icon Too Short has been announced as the halftime entertainment for the Oakland Roots Soccer Club's home opener next month. The Roots will play their 2025 season opener on Saturday, March 22 against San Antonio FC.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes lose to Arizona in Josh Eilert's debut, 83-66
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - It was nearly an impossible task for the Runnin' Utes Wednesday night in their first game under interim head coach Josh Eilert. In his first game since Craig Smith was fired, Eilert's Utes got blown out by #22 Arizona, 83-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
